entities.name: Memory Platform
entities.summary: Core initiative to add persistent memory layers to a multi-agent system.

entities.name: agent_ops
entities.summary: Operations agent focused on task routing, triage, and coordination.

entities.name: agent_eng
entities.summary: Engineering agent maintaining runtime planner and retrieval behavior.

entities.name: Retrieval Cascade
entities.summary: Six-step memory lookup strategy used to optimize relevance and latency.

entities.name: Operational Blackboard
entities.summary: Structured state store for tasks, messages, and decisions.

entities.name: Knowledge Graph
entities.summary: Long-term store for durable entities and relationships.

entities.name: Weekly Consolidation
entities.summary: Scheduled process that converts memory logs into durable knowledge.

relations.fact: Memory Platform implements the Retrieval Cascade as its default lookup policy.
Memory Platform uses the Operational Blackboard for active task and message state.
Memory Platform uses the Knowledge Graph for durable facts and relationships.
Weekly Consolidation updates the Knowledge Graph with extracted permanent facts.
agent_eng implemented retrieval policy enforcement in the Memory Platform.
agent_ops supports Memory Platform operations through triage and routing.
agent_ops coordinates weekly consolidation readiness checks.
Retrieval Cascade queries Operational Blackboard at step four.
Retrieval Cascade queries Knowledge Graph at step five.
Weekly Consolidation improves Memory Platform quality by reducing stale context.
Retrieval quality depends on regular consolidation of accumulated memory logs.
